functions.name: Warning ALT ENCODER OUT
functions.description: Alt encoder unit cannot be used currently

functions.name: Warning IFF
functions.description: Mode 4 code is zeroed or no code is inserted

functions.name: Warning CANOPY UNLOCKED
functions.description: any canopy is not locked and lowered

functions.name: Warning AUTOPILOT PITCH TRIM
functions.description: No fuel flow from left ext tank

functions.name: Warning FUEL LEVEL LOW
functions.description: Low fuel level in cells 1 and 2

functions.name: Warning L ANTI ICE ON
functions.description: Left anti ice bleed air is on

functions.name: Warning L AUX AIR DOOR
functions.description: Left aux air door operating error

functions.name: Warning WINDSHIELD TEMP HIGH
functions.description: Windshield temperature may cause optical problems

functions.name: Warning INERTIAL NAV SYS OUT
functions.description: Inertial Navigation system is either out or off

functions.name: Warning OXYGEN LOW
functions.description: Inertial Navigation system is either out or off

functions.name: Warning HOOK DOWN
functions.description: arresting hook is not up and locked

functions.name: Warning AUTOPILOT DISENGAGE
functions.description: autopilot is disengaged after initial engagement of the AFCS

functions.name: Warning CTR EXT FUEL
functions.description: no fuel flow is detected from external center tank

functions.name: Warning R ANTI ICE ON
functions.description: the right anti-ice bleed air system is on

functions.name: Warning R AUX AIR DOOR
functions.description: Right aux air door operating error

functions.name: Warning DUCT TEMP HIGH
functions.description: temperature within the engine intake duct too high

functions.name: Warning PITCH AUG OFF
functions.description: power is on the airplane and the pitch stab aug switch is not engaged

functions.name: Warning TANK 7 FULL
functions.description: Tank 7 fuel transfer valve fails to open

functions.name: Warning RIGHT EXT FUEL
functions.description: the right external fuel tank is selected but no fuel flow is detected

functions.name: Warning STATIC CORR OFF
functions.description: SPC fails or the CADC switch is placed to CORR OFF

functions.name: Warning SPEED BRAKE OUT
functions.description: the speed brake is out or not fully closed

functions.name: Warning CHECK HYDR GAUGES
functions.description: pressure of any system drops below limit

functions.name: Warning CABIN TURB OVERSPEED
functions.description: cabin turbine of the refrigeration unit is subjected to pressures and temperatures in excess of the normal operation

functions.name: Warning FIRE SYS
functions.description: either a fire/overheat detector sensor tube is burned through, a detector wire chafes to ground

functions.name: Warning SPARE
functions.description: All spare warning lamps in the Telelight Annunciator Panel

functions.name: Range Display Reading
functions.description: Range Indicator Numeric Display as text

functions.name: UHF Remote Channel Indicator Reading
functions.description: Pilot's digital UHF display content as text

functions.description: Pilot's digital UHF display content as text
